summary: Iteration 161: P2 At-Rest PII Field Encryption - Full E2E testing. Backend APIs all working correctly (status, config, progress, audit, ensure-indexes, migrate). Frontend FieldEncryptionPanel had a bug with double /api prefix in axios calls - FIXED. Panel now correctly displays encryption coverage: guests 100% (268/268), users 0% (0/154), bookings 0% (0/3100). Guest CRUD with encryption working: create, read, search, update all decrypt PII transparently.

issues: i18n translation keys showing as raw keys (common.welcome, auth.signIn, etc.) - pre-existing issue

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: FieldEncryptionPanel.jsx had double /api prefix in axios calls (/api/ops/... should be /ops/... since axios baseURL already includes /api)
Backend field_encryption.py correctly implements AES-256-GCM encryption with HMAC-SHA256 search hashes
Dual-read pattern working: encrypted values decrypted transparently, plaintext returned as-is
Hash indexes (_hash_email, _hash_phone, etc.) enable exact-match search on encrypted fields
Migration progress tracked in field_encryption_progress collection
Audit trail recorded in field_encryption_audit collection

success_rate.backend: 100% - 13 passed, 2 skipped (no non-admin user for access control tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components render correctly after fix

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed guests for encryption testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 161 verified P2 At-Rest PII Field Encryption feature. Backend APIs tested: GET /api/ops/field-encryption/status (returns coverage per collection), GET /api/ops/field-encryption/config (returns encryption config), POST /api/ops/field-encryption/ensure-indexes (creates hash indexes), POST /api/ops/field-encryption/migrate/{collection} (migrates plaintext data), GET /api/ops/field-encryption/progress (migration progress), GET /api/ops/field-encryption/audit (audit trail). Guest CRUD tested: POST/GET/PUT /api/pms/guests with transparent encryption/decryption. Frontend FieldEncryptionPanel fixed and working - displays coverage bars, migrate buttons, audit trail. Current encryption status: guests 100% (268/268), users 0% (0/154), bookings 0% (0/3100), reservations 0% (0/0).

guest_crud.search: GET /api/pms/guests/search?q= - uses hash index for encrypted fields

elements.summary: Shows overall coverage percentage and document count
elements.migrate_buttons: Appear for collections with unencrypted documents
elements.index_button: Creates hash indexes for searchable fields

bug_fixed.issue: Double /api prefix in axios calls causing 404 errors
bug_fixed.root_cause: axios.defaults.baseURL already includes /api suffix, but component was using /api/ops/... paths
bug_fixed.fix: Changed /api/ops/field-encryption/... to /ops/field-encryption/... in all axios calls

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints backed by real MongoDB with AES-256-GCM encryption
